title: Pan-Seared Squid with Ukrainian Flair
description: A dish that combines the tender squid with the flavors of Ukrainian cuisine, including the tanginess of sour cream and the earthiness of dill.
instructions: 1. Rinse the squid under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add the squid and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Remove the squid from the pan and set aside.
6. Add the stir fry sauce to the pan and bring to a simmer.
7. Add the baby potatoes to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, or until tender.
8. Stir in the dill and sour cream.
9. Return the squid to the pan and toss to coat with the sauce.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
